Metadata.SimplifiedName: Spy vs Spy III - Arctic Antics
Metadata.SourceFile: Spy vs Spy III (Spy vs Spy Trilogy).tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6400 "SPYVSSPYIII-0400-6400" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Spy vs Spy III - Arctic Antics.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Moved some init code from $03BD to $0400 to ensure it was above the dump start address of $0400.
